summary: Very good soundboard recording of a rare source, though the show itself isn’t described.
review: Reviewers praise the overall sound quality as very good despite a few cuts and note that this SBD capture is relatively rare, making it a nice upgrade over previous versions. No comments are provided about the musical performance or specific songs.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review; it rates the recording quality highly but gives no insight into the show, so rating leans on sound quality alone.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Overall very good clarity; a few cuts noted but nothing major. Rare source makes it valuable.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No performance details provided in the review.
